stories.title: Night of Champions results: Sami Zayn wins Undispu...
stories.summary: Zayn pulled off an upset over Cody Rhodes and Gunther to win a title in Riyadh, Saudi Arabia.

stories.title: Aiyuk blames ex-agent for causing 49ers issues
stories.summary: Brandon Aiyuk said in a YouTube video that his former agent has influenced the ongoing situation between him and 49ers and that general manager John Lynch recently showed up at his house.

stories.title: Penguins put family first, draft both Ruck twins
stories.summary: Marcus and Liam Ruck, twins from Osoyoos, British Columbia, were selected by the Penguins at the NHL draft.

stories.title: ESPN 300 wideout Gayles chooses Crimson Tide
stories.summary: Alabama's thin 2027 recruiting class received a needed jolt Saturday when the Crimson Tide secured a commitment from four-star pass receiver Osani Gayles.

stories.title: Canes acquire Carlson rights in trade with Ducks
stories.summary: The Hurricanes on Saturday acquired the rights to unrestricted free agent defenseman John Carlson in a trade with the Ducks.
